task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jenkins Tools configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Tools' or 'Global Tool Configuration' page in the Jenkins web interface, typically accessed via 'Manage Jenkins'.

task_completion.description: Add a JDK installation named 'JDK-17' with automatic installation disabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JDK installations section, there is an entry where the 'Name' text field is set to 'JDK-17', and the 'Install automatically' checkbox is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Set the JAVA_HOME path for the JDK installation to '/opt/java/openjdk'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'JDK-17' installation block, the 'JAVA_HOME' text field contains the exact path '/opt/java/openjdk'.

task_completion.description: Add a Maven installation named 'Maven-3.9.6' with automatic installation enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Maven installations section, there is an entry where the 'Name' text field is set to 'Maven-3.9.6', and the 'Install automatically' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Set the Maven installation version to '3.9.6'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Maven-3.9.6' installation block, the installer version dropdown (typically under 'Install from Apache') is set to '3.9.6'.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the Tools configuration page, or the screen transitions back to the 'Manage Jenkins' dashboard indicating the settings were saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jenkins web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine Jenkins web UI in a browser, not a mock-up, text editor, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: The agent configured the tools via the Jenkins UI, not terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration should be done through the browser interface. There should be no evidence of the agent directly editing Jenkins XML configuration files (like hudson.tasks.Maven.xml) in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected names, paths, and versions should be entered into the correct Jenkins form fields, not just written down in a notepad or console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Jenkins Global Tool Configuration. 'JDK-17' is a valid custom name for a JDK installation, and '/opt/java/openjdk' is a valid Linux path for OpenJDK. 'Maven-3.9.6' is a real Apache Maven release available for Jenkins auto-installation. Look for these exact values in the Jenkins Tools configuration page.
